title: State Election Access Is Cut Below the Democratic Floor

violations.summary: State officials attempt to run state elections under rules that reduce access below the constitutional floor by ending automatic registration for state elections, eliminating early voting, and restricting absentee voting to a narrow list of statutory excuses.

satisfied_duties.duty: block the restrictive state-election rules and restore the voting-access floor required by Article X
satisfied_duties.outcome: blocked the restrictive state-election rules and ordered restoration of automatic registration, early voting, and no-excuse absentee access consistent with the constitutional floor

ai_summary.primary_violation: State officials attempt to run state elections under rules that reduce access below the constitutional floor by ending automatic registration for state elections, eliminating early voting, and restricting absentee voting to a narrow list of statutory excuses.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
